messages.content: I'm building a project called SmartGarden. It has three pages: Dashboard, Plants, and Settings. The data model includes Plant and WateringSchedule. A Plant has many WateringSchedules.
"Based on what we've discussed, what does the Application Model currently know about this project?"
React + Vite + Tailwind with HashRouter — building all three pages, nav, and the Plant/WateringSchedule data model now.
